data.name: 美女与野兽
data.detailed_description:
Is a female character as the main body of self-moving magic shooting game. Monsters want to invade the girl's home, you need to use magic to repel them.

Game Features:
♦ Female main body, lots of checkpoints.
♦ Up to 25 monsters in total.
♦ Custom role, can upgrade attributes.
♦ Good music and good scenes.

Game play:
♦ After entering the game, click the mouse card to summon the girl to play.
♦ Girls automatically attack monsters that appear.
♦ Each level will have a different number of monsters. Kill all can pass.
♦ Can upgrade the role, improve combat effectiveness.

  • 顯示卡: gtx 3050
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
